name: Efficient Text-to-Audio Generation via Pruning

description: arXiv:2607.13330v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Diffusion-based text-to-audio generative models such as AudioLDM achieve high perceptual quality and strong semantic consistency; however, their practical deployment is hindered by the substantial computational cost of the U-Net denoising backbone. In this work, we apply model pruning to improve the computational efficiency of AudioLDM, a U-Net-...
author: Arshdeep Singh, Yi Yuan, Yun Chen, Wenwu Wang, Mark D. Plumbley
